title: How Senior Engineers Actually Build with AI in 2026 | Build a Full Stack Job Applications Platform
summary: JavaScript Mastery released a comprehensive tutorial on building JobPilot, a full-stack AI job application platform designed to show how senior engineers ship real projects in 2026 using AI agents with proper workflow structure. The course emphasizes system design around AI agents using nine context files and five open-source agent skills to prevent agent drift.
